prompt: A realistic exam hall scene, a stressed student sitting at a wooden desk intensely memorizing from a heavily damaged and messy textbook filled with torn pages, handwritten scribbles, and stains, the book looks overly specific and chaotic. On the desk lies an exam paper that looks clean, structured, and slightly different from the textbook content. The student appears confused and overwhelmed, unable to answer properly. Natural lighting, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, highly detailed textures, realistic photography style. No text, no labels, no symbols, no diagrams, no mathematical notation, no UI elements, no futuristic or AI-related visuals.
metaphor: Student memorizes noisy, damaged textbook but fails on cleaner exam; memorization of noise instead of general pattern.
